Description: This is a high-performance N-channel power MOSFET designed for high-frequency switching applications, particularly in synchronous buck converters for computer processor power supplies and isolated DC-DC converters for telecom and industrial use. It features a very low on-state resistance (RDS(on)), ultra-low gate impedance, and is fully characterized for avalanche energy, making it suitable for efficient, high-current power conversion.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Control terminal. Voltage applied here controls the conduction between Drain and Source.
Power terminal. Typically connected to the higher voltage/current supply side in the circuit.
Power terminal. Typically connected to the load or ground/reference side in the circuit.
